description: channel from DEVELOPER to TESTER for build-complete notification
channel from TESTER to DEPLOYER for tests-passed notification
channel from DEPLOYER to DEVELOPER for deployment-complete notification
channel from DEPLOYER to TESTER for deployment-complete notification
TESTER runs integration tests only after receiving build-complete from DEVELOPER
DEPLOYER deploys only after receiving tests-passed from TESTER
DEVELOPER and TESTER both need the BUILD_SERVER — DEVELOPER must release before TESTER can acquire
strictly sequential pipeline: build → test → deploy
